rulings.Case Title: BETTY UTTERBACK VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Campbell Soup Co.¿S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 1, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Campbell Soup Co.¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant satisfied its burden of production and plaintiffs have not presented any admissible evidence that defendant knew or should have known that defendant¿s disturbance of asbestos-containing materials created a safety hazard for a member of Russell Utterback¿s household. Defendant¿s objections to the declaration of Dr. Richard Cohen are sustained. To the extent that plaintiffs¿ supplemental opposition papers seek another continuance per CCP 437c(h), the request is denied due to the failure to provide any information suggesting that evidence exists to oppose the motion that plaintiffs will be able to present in the future. (220/HEK)
